query: What toppings are applied on the bread?

checked_detections.response: A green spread and a white cream are added on the bread.
A green herb spread is added on the bread slices.
A hand spreads green lettuce leaves and then places slices of yellow cheese on the white bread.
A hand uses a wooden pepper grinder to season the bread with black pepper.
A hand places slices of cheese on the lettuce-covered bread.
